title: tragacantha pallescens
intro: Tragacantha pallescens, also known as pale milk thistle, is a type of plant in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its thistle-like appearance. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Tragacantha pallescens are attributed to its ability to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including liver and gallbladder issues.
